examples.text: وَحَيْثُ مَا كُنْتُمْ فَوَلُّوا وُجُوهَكُمْ شَطْرَهُ
examples.english: wherever you are, turn your faces towards it

examples.text:
10th century, Al-Mutanabbi
وَهَكَذَا كُنْتُ فِي أَهْلِي وَفِي وَطَنِي / إِنَّ النَّفِيسَ غَرِيبٌ حَيْثُمَا كَانَا
wahakaḏā kuntu fī ʔahlī wafī waṭanī / ʔinna n-nafīsa ḡarībun ḥayṯumā kānā
examples.english: (please add an English translation of this quotation)
